parameters.query:
INSERT INTO agent_actions_log
  (agent_name, action_type, entity_type, entity_id, payload, result, error_message)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4::uuid, $5::jsonb, 'failed', $6)
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO workflow_failure_counters (workflow_name, failure_count, last_error, last_failed_at)
VALUES ($1, 1, $6, now())
ON CONFLICT (workflow_name) DO UPDATE SET
  failure_count = workflow_failure_counters.failure_count + 1,
  last_error = EXCLUDED.last_error,
  last_failed_at = now()
RETURNING workflow_name, failure_count;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ text: `🚨 n8n agent failure (x${$json.failure_count}): ${$json.workflow_name}\n${$json.last_error || $('Normalize Error').item.json.error_message}`, workflow: $json.workflow_name, failure_count: $json.failure_count, error: $json.last_error || $('Normalize Error').item.json.error_message }) }}
